task: Launch-quality advanced task: Millimeter-Wave Filter Tolerance Stack Review. Reality context: a 77GHz filter supplier proposes looser machining tolerances. Embedded packet: metric map: metric1=center_freq_shift_MHz, metric2=insertion_loss_dB, metric3=return_loss_dB, metric4=yield_risk_pct; records: R1 center_freq_shift_MHz=4246 insertion_loss_dB=208434 return_loss_dB=423751 yield_risk_pct=14.3; R2 center_freq_shift_MHz=2235 insertion_loss_dB=286443 return_loss_dB=803673 yield_risk_pct=86.2; R3 center_freq_shift_MHz=4518 insertion_loss_dB=634310 return_loss_dB=818526 yield_risk_pct=13; R4 center_freq_shift_MHz=4452 insertion_loss_dB=236308 return_loss_dB=675458 yield_risk_pct=66.3; limit_center_freq_shift_MHz=912; limit_insertion_loss_dB=811486; limit_return_loss_dB=132912; decision_budget_usd=227500; sensitivity_shift_pct=5; hard_threshold_record_count=1; removed_context="challenge required self-contained inputs and objectively checkable scoring". Rules and constraints: Compute margin = metric4 - (0.35*metric1 + 0.25*metric2 + 0.15*metric3); negative margin is fail and margin below 8% of the largest driver is warn. Options or recommendations cannot use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; all calculations must use only the embedded packet, and any contradictory or under-supported record must be marked needs_review. Required work: accept or reject tolerance change with yield evidence; build a reproducible workbook or script, preserve intermediate calculations, and produce an expert-review memo. Deliver mmwave_filter_tolerance.xlsx + supplier_note.md with formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
